시편 16:1.content: Preserve me, God, for I take refuge in you.

시편 16:2.content: My soul, you have said to Yahweh, “You are my Lord. Apart from you I have no good thing.”

시편 16:3.content: As for the saints who are in the earth, they are the excellent ones in whom is all my delight.

시편 16:4.content: Their sorrows shall be multiplied who give gifts to another god. Their drink offerings of blood I will not offer, nor take their names on my lips.

시편 16:5.content: Yahweh assigned my portion and my cup. You made my lot secure.

시편 16:6.content: The lines have fallen to me in pleasant places. Yes, I have a good inheritance.

시편 16:7.content: I will bless Yahweh, who has given me counsel. Yes, my heart instructs me in the night seasons.

시편 16:8.content: I have set Yahweh always before me. Because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.

시편 16:9.content: Therefore my heart is glad, and my tongue rejoices. My body shall also dwell in safety.

시편 16:10.content: For you will not leave my soul in Sheol, neither will you allow your holy one to see corruption.

시편 16:11.content: You will show me the path of life. In your presence is fullness of joy. In your right hand there are pleasures forever more.
